title: senecio ellenbergii
intro: Senecio ellenbergii, also known as Ellenberg's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Senecio ellenbergii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Senecio ellenbergii are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves and flowers, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture.
